programmes.show_description: ...Accident? The tragic case of John Chipp who was thrown 85ft to his death after a night out in Sunderland celebrating his 18th birthday. S1, Ep10
A woman sues her nephew for allegedly slamming a log through her bedroom window and then coming back hours later to vandalize her car. S22, Ep101
A cold-press juicer and a waitress have a whirlwind romance that ends with a fight over an unpaid loan, a mattress and harassment. S22, Ep102
A woman loses custody of her children after remaining in the same home as a sex offender family member; she is sued by her sister-in-law for childcare costs. S22, Ep103
Two days after their son is born, unwed parents dissolve their shared living arrangement; a restraining order and alleged harassment soon follow. S22, Ep104
Friends for over 20 years end their relationship when an untenable living arrangement and a car impound come to light. S22, Ep105
A man sues his former landlord for $5,000 for property damage, theft and harassment. S18, Ep254
A party planner sues her former friends for failure to pay for services rendered for a birthday party. S18, Ep255
A woman accuses her teen daughter of stealing $5,000 in cash from her home. S18, Ep256
A woman sues her ex-husband for destroying a home that she owns. S18, Ep257
A family claim they were forced to move out of their home after a car crashed into their son's bedroom. S18, Ep258
A fundraiser at a bar to benefit a sick woman brings in $600; when the money fails to make it to the bank, the bar owner is sued by the sick woman's sister. S16, Ep48
Shirley Jo Phillips and Wilma Plaster were friends, but when Wilma suspects her friend of stealing, things turn sour. Police find Wilma's scattered body parts S3, Ep1

A married couple and their four children are accused of trashing a family member's house after an eight-year rental. S22, Ep71
A woman sues her business partner for the value of her pants inventory; her partner says she did all the work. S22, Ep72
A woman sues her stepdaughter for the return of her Pomeranian puppy because she fears the animal is being abused. S22, Ep73
A man accuses his Ex girlfriend of purposefully breaking his TV during an argument; she says she was mad that he ate fast food that allegedly upsets his stomach. S22, Ep74

In a child custody tug-of-war, a woman ignores the father of her child's rights and tries to take their teen son. S24, Ep186

A woman thinks her life would make a fascinating book but says the writer she hired delivered subpar material. S22, Ep108

When a young man exhibits allegedly poor restaurant manners, an outraged father takes justice into his own hands. S22, Ep111
Bricks are thrown and assault charges are filed when two women fight over the same unemployed man; the Judge sets them straight. S22, Ep112
A woman sues her former hairdresser for an unpaid loan to hire a divorce attorney; she claims she was paying off the loan by styling her hair for free. S16, Ep2

A woman is suing her sister for damages to an SUV that was in her name; her sister says she repossessed the vehicle two years ago. S16, Ep4
While serving in Iraq, a man meets a woman on Facebook whom he begins dating when he returns home. Both single parents, they end up fighting in court over money. S16, Ep5
Tai O'Donnell was a gifted 19-year-old with a bright future. But, when he entered a volatile relationship with Kamila Ahmad, things took a dark turn. S2, Ep3
Investigators track a hospital worker, who's stolen over one million pounds worth of surgical equipment; and a student nurse swindles thousands from the NHS to fund a luxury lifestyle. S1, Ep1

Dawn Walker's hope for a happy marriage ended on her wedding night when Thomas Nutt murdered her in West Yorkshire. He hid her body in a suitcase, then faked a search. S3, Ep8

Alleged physical abuse of an autistic minor, $15,000 in back child support and a DNA test to prove paternity come into play when a woman sues her ex-boyfriend's fiancé. S16, Ep6
